welcome_h1: Bitcoin for everyone in West Africa
welcome_sub: Buy and sell sats in seconds with your mobile wallet. No bank, no hassle.
testimonial: "I sent sats to my family in Togo in under 10 seconds. Incredible."
welcome_sub2: Create your free account in under 2 minutes.

The code expires in 10 minutes.

toast_name_invalid: The name can only contain letters
toast_lastname_invalid: The last name can only contain letters
toast_pw_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
landing_sub: Create your free account in under 2 minutes
hero_sub: Access Bitcoin starting from 100 CFA francs via the Lightning Network. Explore a new world of financial possibilities!
step_item1_desc: Sign up easily by entering your name, email address, and phone number. The process is quick and simple, designed so you can get started in just a few minutes. Your information will be protected from the very first moment, allowing you to access the platform with complete confidence and security.
step_item2_desc: Access your account at any time using your credentials. Our system incorporates advanced encryption and data protection technologies to safeguard your personal information and funds, providing you with a safe and reliable experience with every login.
step_item3_desc: Enter the amount you want to buy and carefully review the operation details. You can view the real-time price before confirming, allowing you to make informed decisions with complete transparency. The process is simple, intuitive, and designed for all types of users.
step_item4_desc: Complete your purchase in seconds with a single step. Once the operation is confirmed, you will receive your Bitcoin quickly and securely in your account. All transactions are processed efficiently, with clear commissions and no hidden costs.
faq_q1: What is the minimum purchase amount?
faq_a1: You can buy Bitcoin starting from $1 USD or its equivalent in your local currency. No high minimums or restrictions.
faq_q2: How long does it take for my Bitcoin to arrive?
faq_a2: With Lightning Network the transaction is instantaneous (under 5 seconds). Standard on-chain transactions take between 10 and 30 minutes.
faq_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_a3: We accept Visa and Mastercard credit/debit cards, local bank transfers, cash at authorized locations and Lightning Network payments.
faq_a4: We charge a fixed 1.5% commission per transaction. No hidden fees or monthly maintenance charges.
cta_sub: Join thousands of people who are already saving with Bitcoin.
footer_tagline:
The simplest way to save
value with Bitcoin in Africa.
wallets_sub: Flash works with all Lightning-compatible wallets. Send and receive sats easily, without complex configuration.
feat_mining_desc: Supported by thousands of ASIC nodes and globally distributed mining pools. The network remains secure thanks to the Proof of Work consensus mechanism, making it highly resistant to attacks and manipulation. With a limited supply of 21,000,000, Bitcoin guarantees digital scarcity and long-term trust.
feat_borders_desc: Send and receive value anywhere in the world without relying on intermediaries or geographic restrictions. Bitcoin operates on an open global network, accessible to anyone with an internet connection, enabling fast transfers without traditional limits.
feat_frictionless_desc: Operate directly on a peer-to-peer network without the need for banks or central entities. Each transaction is validated in a distributed manner, eliminating single points of failure and reducing unnecessary costs. This enables more direct, efficient and transparent interaction between users.
feat_lightning_desc: Instant and low-cost micropayments through off-chain channels that optimize speed and efficiency. Designed to scale Bitcoin, Lightning enables multiple transactions almost immediately while maintaining the security of the main network.
